name: ABS Road Stud
shortDescription: Two-way prismatic reflective road stud for lane and edge marking.
longDescription: A low-profile, bolt-down ABS road stud with a two-way acrylic prismatic reflector, marking lane edges and road centrelines so they stay visible to headlights from both directions of travel.

images.alt: ABS Road Stud supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
